argument:
Investing in this startup presents a compelling opportunity given the mature and growing landscape of the ITSM software market, corroborated by market analysis [mkt-01] and [mkt-03]. The projected growth from USD 4.53 billion to USD 9.58 billion by 2035, along with organizational shifts towards cloud-based solutions [mkt-04], indicates a willingness to pay that supports future revenue potential. The product's existence, as verified by an integrated ticketing system and AI capabilities [trac-01], points to a tangible offering that could effectively meet market needs. 

While currently the founders demonstrate a reliance on their small team, consisting of two key individuals [risk-01] and [trac-02], the absence of revenue disclosures presents a risk, although it may be acceptable given our high risk appetite for pre-seed investment. The lack of direct competitive insights [risk-04] is concerning but may signal an untapped niche that the team can capitalize on. At this pre-seed stage, our $100,000 check could leverage their existing traction and product validation as they refine their go-to-market strategy. 

The claims central to this investment decision are therefore [mkt-01], [mkt-03], and [trac-01].
